# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Validate file type/content, control storage paths, and apply safe size and processing limits.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Allowlist file types using trusted server-side validation, not just filename extensions.
- Generate server-side filenames and store uploads outside directly executable/public paths when appropriate.
- Apply size limits, content checks, archive safety checks, and image/document processing safeguards.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust only the original filename or extension.
- Do not store uploads in a public/executable path under a user-controlled name.
- Do not allow unlimited file sizes or dangerous archive extraction behavior.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/**
 * Plugin Name: Secure User File Upload
 * Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents with security validation
 * Version: 1.0
 * Author: Your Name
 */

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class Secure_User_File_Upload {
    
    private $upload_dir;
    private $max_file_size = 10485760; // 10MB
    
    private $allowed_types = [
        'image/jpeg' => ['jpg', 'jpeg'],
        'image/png' => ['png'],
        'image/gif' => ['gif'],
        'application/pdf' => ['pdf'],
        'application/msword' => ['doc'],
        'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document' => ['docx'],
        'application/vnd.ms-excel' => ['xls'],
        'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet' => ['xlsx']
    ];
    
    public function __construct() {
        $this->setup_upload_directory();
        add_action('admin_menu', [$this, 'add_menu_page']);
        add_action('wp_ajax_secure_file_upload', [$this, 'handle_file_upload']);
        add_shortcode('user_file_upload', [$this, 'render_upload_form']);
    }
    
    private function setup_upload_directory() {
        $upload_base = wp_upload_dir();
        $this->upload_dir = $upload_base['basedir'] . '/user-files';
        
        if (!file_exists($this->upload_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($this->upload_dir);
            
            // Create .htaccess to prevent direct PHP execution
            $htaccess_content = "Options -Indexes\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "<FilesMatch \"\.(php|php3|php4|php5|phtml|pl|py|jsp|asp|sh|cgi)$\">\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "    Require all denied\n";
            $htaccess_content .= "</FilesMatch>\n";
            file_put_contents($this->upload_dir . '/.htaccess', $htaccess_content);
            
            // Create index.php to prevent directory listing
            file_put_contents($this->upload_dir . '/index.php', '<?php // Silence is golden');
        }
    }
    
    public function add_menu_page() {
        add_menu_page(
            'User Files',
            'User Files',
            'read',
            'user-file-upload',
            [$this, 'render_admin_page'],
            'dashicons-upload',
            30
        );
    }
    
    public function render_admin_page() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_die('Access denied');
        }
        
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_files', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files)) {
            $user_files = [];
        }
        
        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1>My Uploaded Files</h1>
            <?php echo do_shortcode('[user_file_upload]'); ?>
            
            <h2>Your Files</h2>
            <table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped">
                <thead>
                    <tr>
                        <th>File Name</th>
                        <th>Type</th>
                        <th>Upload Date</th>
                        <th>Actions</th>
                    </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                    <?php if (empty($user_files)): ?>
                        <tr><td colspan="4">No files uploaded yet.</td></tr>
                    <?php else: ?>
                        <?php foreach ($user_files as $file): ?>
                            <tr>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($file['original_name']); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($file['type']); ?></td>
                                <td><?php echo esc_html($file['date']); ?></td>
                                <td>
                                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin-ajax.php?action=download_user_file&file_id=' . urlencode($file['id']) . '&nonce=' . wp_create_nonce('download_file_' . $file['id']))); ?>">Download</a> |
                                    <a href="<?php echo esc_url(admin_url('admin-post.php?action=delete_user_file&file_id=' . urlencode($file['id']) . '&nonce=' . wp_create_nonce('delete_file_' . $file['id']))); ?>" onclick="return confirm('Are you sure?');">Delete</a>
                                </td>
                            </tr>
                        <?php endforeach; ?>
                    <?php endif; ?>
                </tbody>
            </table>
        </div>
        <?php
    }
    
    public function render_upload_form() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>Please log in to upload files.</p>';
        }
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="secure-file-upload-form">
            <form id="secure-upload-form" enctype="multipart/form-data">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('secure_file_upload', 'upload_nonce'); ?>
                
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="file_type">File Type:</label>
                    <select name="file_type" id="file_type" required>
                        <option value="">Select Type</option>
                        <option value="profile_picture">Profile Picture</option>
                        <option value="document">Document</option>
                        <option value="other">Other</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                
                <div class="form-group">
                    <label for="file_upload">Choose File:</label>
                    <input type="file" name="file_upload" id="file_upload" required>
                    <small>Allowed: JPG, PNG, GIF, PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX (Max 10MB)</small>
                </div>
                
                <div class="form-group">
                    <button type="submit" class="button button-primary">Upload File</button>
                </div>
                
                <div id="upload-message"></div>
            </form>
        </div>
        
        <style>
            .secure-file-upload-form { max-width: 500px; margin: 20px 0; }
            .form-group { margin-bottom: 15px; }
            .form-group label { display: block; margin-bottom: 5px; font-weight: bold; }
            .form-group input[type="file"], .form-group select { width: 100%; padding: 8px; }
            .form-group small { display: block; margin-top: 5px; color: #666; }
            #upload-message { margin-top: 15px; padding: 10px; }
            #upload-message.success { background: #d4edda; border: 1px solid #c3e6cb; color: #155724; }
            #upload-message.error { background: #f8d7da; border: 1px solid #f5c6cb; color: #721c24; }
        </style>
        
        <script>
        jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
            $('#secure-upload-form').on('submit', function(e) {
                e.preventDefault();
                
                var formData = new FormData(this);
                formData.append('action', 'secure_file_upload');
                
                $('#upload-message').html('Uploading...').removeClass('success error');
                
                $.ajax({
                    url: '<?php echo admin_url('admin-ajax.php'); ?>',
                    type: 'POST',
                    data: formData,
                    processData: false,
                    contentType: false,
                    success: function(response) {
                        if (response.success) {
                            $('#upload-message').html(response.data.message).addClass('success');
                            $('#secure-upload-form')[0].reset();
                            setTimeout(function() { location.reload(); }, 2000);
                        } else {
                            $('#upload-message').html(response.data.message).addClass('error');
                        }
                    },
                    error: function() {
                        $('#upload-message').html('Upload failed. Please try again.').addClass('error');
                    }
                });
            });
        });
        </script>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
    
    public function handle_file_upload() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'You must be logged in to upload files.']);
        }
        
        if (!isset($_POST['upload_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce($_POST['upload_nonce'], 'secure_file_upload')) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Security check failed.']);
        }
        
        if (!isset($_FILES['file_upload']) || $_FILES['file_upload']['error'] !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'File upload error.']);
        }
        
        $file = $_FILES['file_upload'];
        $file_type = isset($_POST['file_type']) ? sanitize_text_field($_POST['file_type']) : 'other';
        
        // Validate file size
        if ($file['size'] > $this->max_file_size) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'File size exceeds 10MB limit.']);
        }
        
        if ($file['size'] === 0) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'File is empty.']);
        }
        
        // Validate MIME type using finfo
        $finfo = finfo_open(FILEINFO_MIME_TYPE);
        $detected_mime = finfo_file($finfo, $file['tmp_name']);
        finfo_close($finfo);
        
        if (!array_key_exists($detected_mime, $this->allowed_types)) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'File type not allowed: ' . $detected_mime]);
        }
        
        // Validate file extension matches MIME type
        $original_filename = basename($file['name']);
        $file_ext = strtolower(pathinfo($original_filename, PATHINFO_EXTENSION));
        
        if (!in_array($file_ext, $this->allowed_types[$detected_mime])) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'File extension does not match content type.']);
        }
        
        // Additional validation for images
        if (strpos($detected_mime, 'image/') === 0) {
            $image_info = @getimagesize($file['tmp_name']);
            if ($image_info === false) {
                wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Invalid image file.']);
            }
            
            // Verify MIME type matches getimagesize
            if ($image_info['mime'] !== $detected_mime) {
                wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Image type mismatch.']);
            }
            
            // Check for reasonable image dimensions
            if ($image_info[0] > 10000 || $image_info[1] > 10000) {
                wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Image dimensions too large.']);
            }
        }
        
        // Additional validation for PDFs
        if ($detected_mime === 'application/pdf') {
            $file_content = file_get_contents($file['tmp_name'], false, null, 0, 1024);
            if (strpos($file_content, '%PDF-') !== 0) {
                wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Invalid PDF file.']);
            }
        }
        
        // Generate secure filename
        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $unique_id = uniqid('', true);
        $secure_filename = $user_id . '_' . $unique_id . '.' . $file_ext;
        
        // Create user-specific directory
        $user_dir = $this->upload_dir . '/' . $user_id;
        if (!file_exists($user_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($user_dir);
        }
        
        $destination = $user_dir . '/' . $secure_filename;
        
        // Move uploaded file
        if (!move_uploaded_file($file['tmp_name'], $destination)) {
            wp_send_json_error(['message' => 'Failed to save file.']);
        }
        
        // Set secure file permissions
        chmod($destination, 0644);
        
        // Store file metadata
        $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_files', true);
        if (!is_array($user_files)) {
            $user_files = [];
        }
        
        $file_id = md5($secure_filename . time());
        $user_files[$file_id] = [
            'id' => $file_id,
            'original_name' => sanitize_file_name($original_filename),
            'secure_name' => $secure_filename,
            'type' => $file_type,
            'mime_type' => $detected_mime,
            'size' => $file['size'],
            'date' => current_time('mysql'),
            'path' => $destination
        ];
        
        update_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_files', $user_files);
        
        wp_send_json_success(['message' => 'File uploaded successfully!']);
    }
}

new Secure_User_File_Upload();

// Handle file download
add_action('wp_ajax_download_user_file', function() {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        wp_die('Access denied');
    }
    
    $file_id = isset($_GET['file_id']) ? sanitize_text_field($_GET['file_id']) : '';
    $nonce = isset($_GET['nonce']) ? sanitize_text_field($_GET['nonce']) : '';
    
    if (!wp_verify_nonce($nonce, 'download_file_' . $file_id)) {
        wp_die('Security check failed');
    }
    
    $user_id = get_current_user_id();
    $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_files', true);
    
    if (!is_array($user_files) || !isset($user_files[$file_id])) {
        wp_die('File not found');
    }
    
    $file = $user_files[$file_id];
    
    if (!file_exists($file['path'])) {
        wp_die('File does not exist');
    }
    
    header('Content-Type: ' . $file['mime_type']);
    header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . $file['original_name'] . '"');
    header('Content-Length: ' . filesize($file['path']));
    header('Cache-Control: no-cache, must-revalidate');
    header('Pragma: no-cache');
    
    readfile($file['path']);
    exit;
});

// Handle file deletion
add_action('admin_post_delete_user_file', function() {
    if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
        wp_die('Access denied');
    }
    
    $file_id = isset($_GET['file_id']) ? sanitize_text_field($_GET['file_id']) : '';
    $nonce = isset($_GET['nonce']) ? sanitize_text_field($_GET['nonce']) : '';
    
    if (!wp_verify_nonce($nonce, 'delete_file_' . $file_id)) {
        wp_die('Security check failed');
    }
    
    $user_id = get_current_user_id();
    $user_files = get_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_files', true);
    
    if (is_array($user_files) && isset($user_files[$file_id])) {
        $file = $user_files[$file_id];
        
        if (file_exists($file['path'])) {
            unlink($file['path']);
        }
        
        unset($user_files[$file_id]);
        update_user_meta($user_id, 'uploaded_files', $user_files);
    }
    
    wp_redirect(admin_url('admin.php?page=user-file-upload'));
    exit;
});
